(z) “unit” means beneficial interest of the investors in the Alternative Investment Fund or a scheme of the Alternative
Investment Fund and shall include shares or partnership interests;
24 Inserted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Amendment) Regulations,
2013, w.e.f. 16-09-2013
25 Substituted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Second Amendment)
Regulations, 2021, w.e.f. 05-05-2021. Prior to its substitution, clause (aa) read as under :
“(aa) “venture capital undertaking” means a domestic company:
heading: Section 4 of the Companies Act, 1956;”.
